name: MAST Oceanheart Needle Cartridge – 0.30mm 3RL
shortDescription: Sterile, individually packaged premium needle cartridge with 0.30 mm needle thickness, 3RL (Round Liner) configuration. Excellent for eyebrow shading, ombré technique, and lip pigmentation.
description:
The MAST Oceanheart needle cartridge is an essential accessory for precise permanent makeup and body tattooing. Made from high-quality materials, in strictly sterile, individually packaged form.

The 0.30 mm needle thickness and 3RL (3-needle Round Liner) configuration is ideal for eyebrow shading, ombré technique, and lip pigmentation. The 3 needles together provide wider pigment distribution than 1RL, while still allowing controlled line work. The transparent housing allows monitoring of pigment flow during work.

Compatible with most universal tattoo machines – especially recommended for MAST and Dragonhawk machines.

faq.question: What techniques is the 0.30mm 3RL needle cartridge ideal for?
faq.answer: The 0.30 mm needle thickness and 3RL configuration is ideal for eyebrow shading, ombré technique, lip pigmentation, and fine body tattoo lines. The 3 needles provide wider pigment distribution than 1RL while maintaining precision.

faq.question: Is the needle cartridge sterile, and how many times can it be used?
faq.answer: Yes, every needle cartridge arrives in sterile, individually packaged form with ISO certification. Needle cartridges are single-use – for hygienic reasons, a new cartridge must be used for each treatment.

faq.question: Which machines is the Oceanheart needle cartridge compatible with?
faq.answer: Oceanheart needle cartridges work with a universal cartridge system, making them compatible with most standard tattoo machines. Especially recommended for MAST (P60, Nano 2, Y22 Pro) and Dragonhawk machines.
